finding: Current c4 no-flag rowchunk2 profiler refresh on GPU1/XTX stayed generated-token green at [137]*4 with grouped-compact MoE, accepted c-aware projection, row-aware batched_lm_head, native batch full-attention context and KV append kernels, and batched sampler argmax kernels present.
